name: AWARE INC /MA/
summary: Aware, Inc. is a biometric identification company providing software solutions for government and commercial customers to enroll, identify, authenticate, and manage identities. Its portfolio includes AwareSDK (mobile biometric authentication), AwareABIS (large-scale biometric identification), AFIX Suite (law enforcement fingerprint identification), Awareness Platform (biometric integration iPaaS), WebEnroll (browser-based enrollment), Nexa SDKs (fingerprint, face, iris, voice matching), and JPEG2000 imaging products. Aware serves border control, law enforcement, national defense, mobile enrollment, and secure transaction markets globally.
